description: In the image, a man is seated at a wooden table in a room with a window and a door on one side. The man is wearing a blue shirt and shorts, and he's holding a glass of water in his hand. On the table, there are two other glasses - one blue and one white. A white towel is also draped over the back of the chair where the man is sitting. The room has a light beige color scheme, creating a calm and serene atmosphere.
